---
pagetitle: "People"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: faculty
    contents: "people/faculty/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    image-height: 225px
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    grid-item-align: center
    sort: sortby
    field-display-names: 
      started: "Started"
  - id: postdoctoral-researcher
    contents: "people/post/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    image-height: 225px
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    grid-item-align: center
    sort: sortby
    field-display-names: 
      started: "Started"
  - id: graduate-students
    contents: "people/grad/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    image-height: 225px
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    grid-item-align: center
    sort: sortby
    field-display-names: 
      started: "Started"
  - id: under-students
    contents: "people/under/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    image-height: 225px
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    grid-item-align: center
    sort: sortby
    field-display-names: 
      started: "Started"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">People</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```


## Faculty

:::{#faculty}
:::

## Postdoctoral Researchers

:::{#postdoctoral-researcher}
:::

## Graduate Students

:::{#grad-students}
:::

## Undergraduate Students

:::{#under-students}
:::

## Research Assistants

```{r assistants}
#| echo: false

library(reactable)
assistants <- read.csv("people/assistants.csv")
reactable(assistants)
```

## Alumni

The full list of former research staff and assistants can be found [Here](people/alumni.qmd).
